title: best herbal teas for period cramp
description: Curcuma longa tea contains bioactive constituents such as curcumin, demethoxycurcumin, and bisdemethoxycurcumin, which have potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to alleviate period cramp pain. The analgesic and anti-spasmodic properties of this herbal tea also contribute to its efficacy in treating menstrual cramps, making it a popular natural remedy for this condition.
